description:
This space provides a comprehensive view of streaming profit and loss (PnL) for dealing accounts and customers, enabling analysis of both realized and unrealized PnL over time across instruments and hedge servers.

**Capabilities:**
- Track and analyze realized and unrealized PnL by instrument, hedge server, and additional time dimensions (hourly, daily, weekly).
- Calculate net PnL changes over time or compare PnL snapshots between different periods.
- Assess trading metrics such as commissions, total external fees, open positions, and conversion rates.
- Evaluate PnL for specific liquidity accounts and price rates.

**Limitations:**
- Does not include detailed trade-by-trade breakdowns or customer-level identifiers beyond instrument and hedge server.
- Lacks direct integration with external market data or order book details.
- Unable to analyze non-PnL-related risk, exposure, or portfolio aggregation outside the available fields.
serialized_space:
{
  "version": 2,
  "data_sources": {
    "tables": [
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_account_pl"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_realized_customer_pl"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_unrealized_customer_pl"
      }
    ]
  },
  "instructions": {
    "example_question_sqls": [
      {
        "id": "01f024d5a0641ec3a3452e8e3ad240af",
        "question": [
          "do it for hs223"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  (SUM(`u`.`UnrealizedPL`) + SUM(`r`.`RealizedPL`)) AS `clients_zero`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`dealing`.`bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_unrealized_customer_pl` AS `u`\n",
          "    JOIN `main`.`dealing`.`bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_realized_customer_pl` AS `r`\n",
          "      ON `u`.`HedgeServerId` = `r`.`HedgeServerId`\n",
          "      AND `u`.`InstrumentId` = `r`.`InstrumentId`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `u`.`OccurredAt` >= '2025-04-29 08:00:00'\n",
          "  AND `u`.`OccurredAt` < '2025-04-29 09:00:00'\n",
          "  AND `r`.`OccurredAt` >= '2025-04-29 08:00:00'\n",
          "  AND `r`.`OccurredAt` < '2025-04-29 09:00:00'\n",
          "  AND `u`.`HedgeServerId` = 223"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f053a44ca110888369cb7122a627ce",
        "question": [
          "i want you to take the last unrealised PnL of last week ending 20/6/2025 at 20:00:00 GMT and the last unrealised PnL OF THIS WEEK ENDING  27/6/2025 at 20:00:00 GMT, for instrumentID=1001 and Hdgeserver=121 anc calculate the unrealised difference"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "WITH last_week AS (\n",
          "  SELECT\n",
          "    `UnrealizedPL`\n",
          "  FROM\n",
          "    `main`.`dealing`.`bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_unrealized_customer_pl`\n",
          "  WHERE\n",
          "    `OccurredAt` <= '2025-06-20 20:00:00'\n",
          "    AND `InstrumentId` = 1001\n",
          "    AND `HedgeServerId` = 121\n",
          "  ORDER BY\n",
          "    `OccurredAt` DESC\n",
          "  LIMIT 1\n",
          "),\n",
          "this_week AS (\n",
          "  SELECT\n",
          "    `UnrealizedPL`\n",
          "  FROM\n",
          "    `main`.`dealing`.`bronze_dealingstreaming_pnl_dealing_unrealized_customer_pl`\n",
          "  WHERE\n",
          "    `OccurredAt` <= '2025-06-27 20:00:00'\n",
          "    AND `InstrumentId` = 1001\n",
          "    AND `HedgeServerId` = 121\n",
          "  ORDER BY\n",
          "    `OccurredAt` DESC\n",
          "  LIMIT 1\n",
          ")\n",
          "SELECT\n",
          "  (this_week.`UnrealizedPL` - last_week.`UnrealizedPL`) AS `unrealized_difference`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  last_week,\n",
          "  this_week"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: dealing streaming
